name: Cheddar Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Stir in the cheddar cheese, onion, and pimento.
4. Add the milk and mix until well combined.
5. Transfer the dough to a 9-inch square baking pan.
6. Bake at 450 degrees F (232 degrees C) for 25 to 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool slightly, then cut into squares.
8. Serve warm.
